price: Und Wir haben ihnen etwas gleicher Art erschaffen, was sie besteigen.
arabic: وَخَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثۡلِهِۦ مَا يَرۡكَبُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wakhalaqnā lahum min mith'lihi mā yarkabūna
